user.title: Clean Energy
user.description: Monitors energy sensors for anomalous spikes and corrects long-term statistics. Set the maximum realistic power draw for any single sensor.

confirm.title: Spike detected: {name}
confirm.description:
A suspicious spike was detected on **{entity_id}**: {spike_from} → {spike_to} {spike_unit} (implied {implied_power_kw} kW).

Would you like Clean Energy to automatically correct future spikes on this sensor?

abort.already_configured: This sensor is already being monitored
abort.no_options: Per-sensor entries have no configurable options

error.already_monitored: This sensor is already being monitored
error.not_energy_sensor: This entity is not a total_increasing energy sensor
